look_at.text: Two people locked in a FIFA match with the focus of professional athletes. Neither has looked up since I entered. The score is 2-2. The tension is real.
The FIFA screen shows the final score. Your win. It still feels slightly unreal.
A large screen showing FIFA. Two controllers on the desk. Someone has taped a league table to the wall beside it. Chip's name is at the top in red marker. All other entries are crossed out.

use.text: The game is over. I won. I don't need to play again.

look_at.text: The whiteboard is covered in sprint velocity charts and a large org diagram. In the bottom corner: 'HR relocating to floor _8 — use new lift code'. You already noted the second digit.

The whiteboard is dense with sprint velocity charts and a large org diagram that seems to have no top. At the bottom, in different handwriting: 'HR relocating to floor _8 — use new lift code'. Someone has wiped the first digit clean. But the second digit is clear: 8.
I can't get to the whiteboard. The FIFA players are completely in the way.

use.text: I'm not writing on someone's sprint board.

look_at.text: A USB stick sitting next to a workstation, labelled in small type: 'CVNA BUILD v4.1 — FINAL_FINAL_v2'. Someone's entire project, just sitting there.

pick_up.text: I already have the USB stick.
You pick up the USB stick. It's lightweight. Potentially important. You pocket it.

use.text: I'd need a computer to use this.

look_at.text: Four workstations arranged in an L-shape. Only one is active, showing a terminal window mid-scroll. The others are sleeping. A sticky note on the active monitor reads: 'compile then go home'.
A cluster of beanbags in the corner, the kind that appear in 'collaborative spaces' brochures and are used by nobody. One has a laptop power cable draped over it. The cable goes nowhere.

use.text: I'm not sitting in a beanbag right now. I have things to do.

pick_up.text: The beanbag is too large and too formless to carry.

look_at.text: A small mug next to the whiteboard. It reads 'SPRINT CHAMPION'. The contents are cold. Victory has a shelf life.

use.text: I'll leave it. It's someone's trophy.

look_at.text: The door back to the office aisle.

open.text: You head back to the aisle.

use.text: You head back to the aisle.
